source.title: ANF06. Fathers of the Third Century: Gregory Thaumaturgus, Dionysius the Great, Julius Africanus, Anatolius, and Minor Writers, Methodius, Arnobius

verses.book: Some Other Fragments of the Same Methodius.
Some Other Fragments of the Same Methodius.
verses.text: Justice, as it seems, is four square, on all sides equal and like.

verses.book: Some Other Fragments of the Same Methodius.
verses.text: The just judgment of God is accommodated to our affections; and such as our estate is, proportionate and similar shall the retribution be which is allotted us.
